turns.content:
Perform a Panoramic Architectural Audit (Tier 3) of the entire PROJECT_elements repository. 
1. Use the full context to cross-reference every folder against the Projectome (P = C ⊔ X) split.
2. Identify specific 'Concordance Drift'—where code exists in Body without a corresponding 'Brain' specification in context-management/.
3. Verify if every 'Operational Script' (ops/, scripts/) is in the Body and every 'Governance/Manual' is in the Brain.
4. Provide a definitive 'Migration Matrix' for any final polluting items found in this holistic view.
